content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/models.py:1	from database import db2	import string3	import random4	5	class URL(db.Model):6	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)7	    original_url = db.Column(db.String(512), nullable=False)8	    short_code = db.Column(db.String(10), unique=True, nullable=False)9	10	    def __init__(self, **kwargs):11	        super().__init__(**kwargs)12	        if not self.short_code:13	            self.short_code = self.generate_short_code()14	15	    def generate_short_code(self):16	        characters = string.ascii_letters + string.digits17	        while True:18	            code = ''.join(random.choices(characters, k=6))19	            if not URL.query.filter_by(short_code=code).first():20	                return code
